i will use a udp packet sender and receiver to measure the round trip time  
i will set up a server to receive the packet and record the time it took to arrive

i will calculate the round trip time by subtracting the sending time from the receiving time  
i will use a timer to track the duration of the packet transmission  
i will compare the results with a ping tool to verify the accuracy of the measurement
